# Database Project Layout Expert Skill

This skill covers generated/extracted SDK-style database project layout conventions, file naming,
security artifact organization, csproj defaults, and one-object-per-file structure in pgPacTool.

## Use this skill when changing
- `CsprojProjectGenerator`
- generated file/folder conventions
- extracted project shape
- README examples of project structure
- security folder layout
